message:
test(output): add unit tests for diff, error factories, and StyledTable

Cover ComputeDiff (identical/different/partial/empty), countLines,
error factory functions (NoSessionsError, AgentTypeError,
PersonaNotFoundError, CheckpointNotFoundError, ConfigLoadError,
MultipleSessions, InvalidFlagError), StyledTable (basic/footer/
border/empty/fluent/missing cols), NewErrorWithDetails,
PrintJSONCompact, and MarshalJSON.

Raises output package coverage from 51.6% to 68.1%.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
